name: McKay-Thompson series of class 2B for the Monster group.
formula: Expansion of 24 + chi(-q)^24 / q in powers of q where chi() is a Ramanujan theta function.
Empirical: Sum_{n>=0} a(n) / exp(n*Pi) = 32 * exp(-Pi) = A388179. - _Simon Plouffe_, Sep 15 2025
program: (PARI) {a(n) = my(A); if( n<-1, 0, n++; A = x * O(x^n); polcoeff( 24 * x + (eta(x + A) / eta(x^2 + A))^24, n))}; /* _Michael Somos_, Jul 05 2014 */
xref: A134786, A045479, A007191, A097340, A035099, A007246, A107080 are all essentially the same sequence.
